summary: Central estimate ~$18.7B for Q4 2025 APAC constant currency revenue, based on Q3 2025 APAC CC of $17.691B (+19.28% YoY), estimated Q4 2024 base of ~$15.7B, and 18-19% CC growth rate
content: Key data: Q3 2025 APAC CC = $17.691B, YoY growth 19.28%. Derived Q3 2024 APAC headline = $14.831B. FY 2024 APAC headline = $56.82B. Estimated Q4 2024 APAC = $15.5-16.0B. Three methods converge around $18.5-19.0B central. Monte Carlo blended median: $18.7B. Percentiles: P10=$17.5B, P50=$18.7B, P90=$20.3B.
